# Caching.IsCacheableMethod method

Returns `true` when *method* is one of the five cacheable methods. Mirrors TS `isCacheableMethod`.

```csharp
public static bool IsCacheableMethod(string method)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| method | The method name. |

## Return Value

`true` when the method carries caching hints.
